response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while he has some legacy C++ exposure from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across web, embedded, and desktop systems.
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring through workshops and code katas.
Proven ability to deliver scalable systems using event-driven architectures and DevOps practices.
concerns: No recent or demonstrable C++/STL development in the last 9 years; core technical requirement unmet.
Lacks experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT, REST in automation contexts, or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus).
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, with no evidence of cloud-native C++ or on-prem industrial platform development.
